articles.title: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
articles.description: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.

articles.title: People flee as building collapses on Caracas outskirts
articles.description: The capital and its surrounding areas have seen some of the worst damage from the 7.2 and 7.5 quakes, which hit a minute apart.

articles.title: TikTok influencer charged with murdering boyfriend in Dubai
articles.description: Influencer Brooke George, 23, from Kent, claims she acted in self defence in stabbing her partner.

articles.title: Burnham could be leader in weeks under Labour timetable
articles.description: Andy Burnham could take over from Keir Starmer by 17 July, if he continues to be the only Labour MP in the race.
